title: COVID-19: ICE reportedly resumes arrests after pausing due to pandemic
description_html: The New York Times reports that ICE agents made 300 arrests in Los Angeles. More than a thousand others were arrested in New York, Atlanta and Phoenix, as well as in cities in Colorado, Idaho, Montana, Nevada, New Jersey, Utah, and Wyoming. [ID #1055]
